ruleScores.ruleName: Every Rule Has Severity and Enforcement
Every Rule Has a Bad → Good Example
Agent Document Has Version and Last-Updated

strengths: All 7 required sections present with proper structure
All 8 rules have proper severity and enforcement labels in correct format
Exactly 8 rules - within the 5-9 rule bounds
Every rule includes concrete Bad → Good code examples with clear violations and corrections
Related section properly defines boundaries with Architecture, Security, and Design System agents
Enforcement tools specifically named (ESLint jsx-a11y, axe-core, Manual Review, Code Review, PR Review Process)
YAML metadata includes version 1.0 and last_updated 2026-04-09
Checklist has exactly 8 items matching the 8 rules in same order
Tool Integration table properly maps all rules to specific enforcement mechanisms
